stories.title: Molinare hires Des Carey for Dublin studio
stories.summary: Molinare Creative Group has appointed Des Carey as Executive Director, Growth & Innovation for its Dublin-based studio, Elephant Goldfish.
stories.why_it_matters: The appointment signals a strategic focus on international expansion and the integration of emerging production technologies within the Molinare Creative Group, leveraging Carey's extensive background in global cinema innovation.
verified_facts: Des Carey has been appointed as Executive Director, Growth & Innovation at Elephant Goldfish.
Elephant Goldfish is a member of the Molinare Creative Group.
Des Carey previously held senior roles at Company 3, Light Iron, and Samsung.
warnings: The article text contains a date stamp of 16.07.26, which appears to be a future date or a potential typo in the source material.

drafts.concise: We are pleased to share that the Molinare Creative Group has appointed Des Carey as Executive Director, Growth & Innovation for its Dublin-based studio, Elephant Goldfish. With over 25 years of experience across production, post-production, and technology—including senior roles at Samsung and Light Iron—Des will lead strategic growth and partnership initiatives. This appointment marks a significant step in the group’s commitment to expanding its international presence and integrating next-generation production technologies. We look forward to seeing the impact of his expertise on the team’s continued development. #Molinare #ElephantGoldfish #PostProduction
drafts.investor: The Molinare Creative Group continues to strengthen its leadership team with the appointment of Des Carey as Executive Director, Growth & Innovation at Elephant Goldfish. This strategic hire underscores the group’s focus on scaling its operations in Ireland and enhancing its capabilities in emerging production technologies. By bringing in deep international expertise from his previous roles at Samsung and Industrial Light & Magic, the group is well-positioned to drive further innovation and commercial growth. This move reflects a clear ambition to build upon the group’s existing creative heritage and expand its footprint in the global market. #Investment #GrowthStrategy #MediaTech
drafts.people: A warm welcome to Des Carey, who joins the Molinare Creative Group as Executive Director, Growth & Innovation at Elephant Goldfish in Dublin. Des brings a wealth of international experience, having collaborated with some of the industry’s most respected filmmakers and led global initiatives in cinematic technology. His appointment is a testament to the high-calibre talent within the Molinare Creative Group and its ongoing commitment to fostering a culture of innovation and excellence. We are excited to see how his leadership will support the team at Elephant Goldfish as they continue to evolve and grow. #Leadership #Innovation #CreativeIndustry
